mapper.select: SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE STATUS != 'DELETED' ORDER BY QUEST_ID DESC
SELECT QUEST_ID as questId, TITLE, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE QUEST_ID = #{questId}

SELECT ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as name, l.ZIP_CODE as zipCode, l.ADDRESS as address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL as addressDetail, l.LATITUDE as latitude, l.LONGITUDE as longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE as locationType, l.DESCRIPTION as description FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = #{questId} ORDER BY ql.VISIT_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_QUEST SET TITLE = #{title}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, CATEGORY = #{category}, REWARD_EXP = #{rewardExp}, REWARD_POINT = #{rewardPoint}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE QUEST_ID = #{questId}
